parse.description: Empty CSS input results in no iterations (iter.hasNext() false) and only startDocument/endDocument
parse.precondition: Reader over empty string; real CssErrorHandler and CssContentHandler implementations
parse.expectedResult: doc.startDocument() called once; doc.endDocument() called once; no further handler invocations

parse.description: Single at-rule token triggers handleAtRule branch (type==ATKEYWORD) then loop exits
parse.precondition: Reader over "@import 'a.css';"; real CssErrorHandler and spy CssContentHandler to record startAtRule/endAtRule
parse.expectedResult: doc.startDocument() once; doc.startAtRule("import") then doc.endAtRule("import"); doc.endDocument()

parse.description: Single rule-set token triggers handleRuleSet branch (type!=ATKEYWORD) then loop exits
parse.precondition: Reader over "h1{}"; real CssErrorHandler and spy CssContentHandler to record selectors/endSelectors
parse.expectedResult: doc.startDocument() once; doc.selectors(...) called with non-empty list; doc.endSelectors(...) called; doc.endDocument()

parse.description: Multiple mixed tokens iterate twice: first at-rule then rule-set
parse.expectedResult: doc.startDocument(); startAtRule("x"); endAtRule("x"); selectors for "h2" and endSelectors; endDocument()

parse.description: IO error thrown by scan(reader) propagates IOException
parse.precondition: Reader that throws IOException on read; real handlers
parse.expectedResult: throws IOException; no calls to docHandler

parse.description: Premature EOF in handleRuleSet breaks loop and ends document
parse.precondition: Reader over incomplete rule-set "p{color:"; real handlers
